name: tgmock
description: Telegram bot testing for Codex via a fake Bot API, pytest fixtures, and MCP tools

interface.longDescription: Run Telegram bot flows against a fake Bot API from Codex, inspect snapshots, tap buttons, and debug startup/logging issues.
defaultPrompt: Set up tgmock for this Telegram bot project
Start tgmock and test the /start flow
Debug why this Telegram bot does not respond
